_note: Write-side benchmark: how well does the system decide WHAT to store? Each scenario is a mini conversation replayed through the REAL write pipeline (per-turn extraction + end-of-call harvest). Scoring is deterministic keyword matching against ground truth: should_store (durable facts that must be captured), should_not_store (junk/fleeting/assistant-said/negated that must NOT be), and coexist (distinct-but-similar facts that must both survive dedup).

turns.content: I just adopted a corgi named Biscuit, I'm so excited
Congratulations! Corgis are wonderful. How's Biscuit settling in?
Really well. Oh, I also ran to the grocery store this morning, total madhouse
Sounds hectic. Anything else on your mind?
Yeah, I work as a nurse at the children's hospital, long shifts lately
I'm heading out to watch the fireworks tonight
Nice! You should grab a coffee for the drive home, keep yourself alert.
Ha, maybe. It's about a 40 minute drive back
Want me to suggest a late-night snack routine?
No, eating late at night is not something I want to do, it wrecks my sleep
I have a job interview Tuesday with Acme for a backend engineering role
Exciting! Good luck with the prep.
Thanks. I also have a second interview Thursday with Globex for a data analyst role
I went for a walk in the park yesterday, it was pretty
I've actually started running every single morning, training for a half marathon
